summary: The revised support reply prompt fixes the missing-location issue while keeping the answer concise.

what_looks_correct.description: The answer gives a concrete location and next step.

findings.description: The fallback asks for browser information but could also ask whether the user has export permission.
evidence: The output tells the customer to refresh and share browser information.
findings.suggested_change: Ask for browser and workspace permission context when export is still unavailable.

decision_points.description: Should the prompt include permission troubleshooting in fallback text?
